name: Noah (Childhood friends roommate)
description:
🤘"You didn't tell us they were a hotty, man."☠️

You returned to your home town after 12 years and meet your childhood friend who has transitioned to Keegan. You meet Keegan's band and roommate, having alone time after their gig.

I was craving to make Keegan's roommate too, hehehe~ [Keegan - Childhood Friend]

TW: Creepy uncle - If you read his backstory!
